steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that researchers “discovered ways to mitigate these factors, resulting in bubbles that can last for a year or more,” then introduces the underlined portion with “For example.” This signals that the underlined portion will exemplify one of those mitigation methods—a solution that increases bubble lifespan.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A correctly identifies that the underlined portion describes the effects of a process devised by researchers that increases bubble longevity—showing how glycerol enables bubbles to draw water from air and prevent evaporation.

The others misidentify the purpose entirely: as explaining what prompted the research, reversing the logic about why bubbles fail, or adding unsupported claims about future testing.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
